data.content: Plan review requested revisions. The current plan correctly identifies KnotRecord -> Beat alias propagation and most view updates, but it misses two required data-flow changes: 1) wave-planner only receives WaveBeat objects from /api/waves, and WaveBeat plus the waves API/OpenAPI contract currently have no alias field, so that path must be added explicitly; 2) DepTree only receives BeatDependency edges and cannot resolve aliases today, so the plan needs a concrete source of linked-beat alias data rather than assuming it is available. Test coverage should include alias mapping in toBeat(), waves API propagation/rendering, and dependency alias fallback behavior.
